hero.title: Your Spanish Property Journey, Simplified
hero.subtitle: From first viewing to golden keys — Azely guides cross-border buyers through every step of acquiring property in Spain.

features.title: Everything You Need, Nothing You Don't
features.subtitle: 39 modules across 6 layers — pick exactly what your agency needs.

journey.title: Client Journey
journey.description: Onboarding, deal tracking, NIE applications, mortgage comparison, e-signatures — the complete buyer experience.

operations.title: Property Operations
operations.description: Renovation management, rental dashboards, dynamic pricing, contractor marketplace — maximize property value.

compliance.title: Intelligence & Compliance
compliance.description: Cross-border tax dashboards, regulatory compliance, cost calculators — navigate bureaucracy with confidence.

team.title: Team & CRM
team.description: Deal pipelines, contact management, KPI dashboards, reporting — run your agency like a machine.

scale.title: Scale & Invest
scale.description: Multi-property portfolios, fund management, investor portals — from single buyer to institutional scale.

foundation.title: White-Label Foundation
foundation.description: Your brand, your colors, your domain. Multi-language, document vaults, notifications — all built in.

regions.title: Spanning the Mediterranean
regions.subtitle: From the Costa Blanca to the Algarve — wherever Northern Europeans are buying, Azely is there.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Agency?
cta.subtitle: Join the platform that's redefining cross-border real estate. Start with what you need, scale as you grow.
cta.note: No commitment required. See Azely in action.

footer.description: State-of-the-art real estate platform for cross-border European property agencies.
